source: proof M0 spike (06-m0-spike-notes.md) + gate-2 realized total_cost_usd; no live $/Mtok feed exists (M0 item 16), so these are measured per-run costs, not vendor list prices.
note: perRun is the realized cost of ONE headless paired-run arm on an identical prompt-cached fixture. low/mid/high carry the run-to-run cost spread M0 item 17 measured (up to ~6.6x on an identical prompt), so the estimator shows a band, never a point.
